CKV_AWS_189.recipe_text: Add/ensure kms_key_id = "alias/aws/ebs" on the target aws_ebs_volume and keep encrypted = true.

CKV_AWS_161.recipe_text: Add/ensure iam_database_authentication_enabled = true on the target aws_db_instance.

CKV_AWS_26.recipe_text: Add/ensure kms_master_key_id = "alias/aws/sns" on the target aws_sns_topic.

CKV_AWS_27.recipe_text: Add/ensure kms_master_key_id = "alias/aws/sqs" on the target aws_sqs_queue.

CKV_AWS_50.recipe_text: Add a tracing_config block with mode = "Active" inside the target aws_lambda_function resource.

CKV_AWS_116.recipe_text: Add a dead_letter_config block with a target_arn attribute inside the target aws_lambda_function. Use a placeholder ARN such as "arn:aws:sqs:us-east-1:123456789012:dlq" if no real ARN is available.

CKV_AWS_117.recipe_text: Add a vpc_config block with subnet_ids and security_group_ids inside the target aws_lambda_function. Use placeholder list values if real IDs are not declared in the file.

CKV_AWS_272.recipe_text: Add/ensure code_signing_config_arn on the target aws_lambda_function. Reference an existing aws_lambda_code_signing_config resource ARN, or add a new one with allowed_publishers.

CKV_AWS_293.recipe_text: Add/ensure deletion_protection = true on the target aws_db_instance or aws_rds_cluster.

CKV2_AWS_60.recipe_text: Add/ensure deletion_protection = true on the target aws_rds_cluster.

CKV_AWS_16.recipe_text: Add/ensure storage_encrypted = true on the target aws_db_instance.

CKV_AWS_133.recipe_text: Set backup_retention_period = 7 on the aws_db_instance resource to retain automated backups for 7 days.

CKV_AWS_162.recipe_text: Add/ensure performance_insights_enabled = true on the target aws_db_instance.

CKV_AWS_129.recipe_text: Add/ensure enabled_cloudwatch_logs_exports contains the appropriate log types (e.g. ["audit", "error", "general", "slowquery"] for MySQL, or ["postgresql", "upgrade"] for PostgreSQL) on the target aws_db_instance.

CKV_AWS_36.recipe_text: Add/ensure enable_log_file_validation = true on the target aws_cloudtrail resource.

CKV_AWS_118.recipe_text: Add/ensure monitoring_interval is set to 1, 5, 10, 15, 30, or 60 on aws_db_instance or aws_rds_cluster_instance, and set monitoring_role_arn to an IAM role ARN for RDS enhanced monitoring.

CKV_AWS_67.recipe_text: Add/ensure is_multi_region_trail = true on the target aws_cloudtrail resource.

CKV_AWS_35.recipe_text: Add/ensure kms_key_id on aws_cloudtrail and reference a customer-managed KMS key ARN.

CKV_AWS_51.recipe_text: Add/ensure image_tag_mutability = "IMMUTABLE" on aws_ecr_repository to prevent tag overwrite.

CKV_AWS_163.recipe_text: Add an image_scanning_configuration block with scan_on_push = true inside the target aws_ecr_repository resource.

CKV_AWS_136.recipe_text: Add an encryption_configuration block with encryption_type = "KMS" inside the target aws_ecr_repository. Optionally add kms_key referencing an existing aws_kms_key resource ARN.

CKV2_AWS_41.recipe_text: Add a metadata_options block with http_tokens = "required" and http_endpoint = "enabled" inside the target aws_instance resource.

CKV_AWS_79.recipe_text: Add a metadata_options block to the aws_instance resource with http_tokens = "required" and http_endpoint = "enabled" to enforce IMDSv2 and block IMDSv1.

CKV_AWS_8.recipe_text: Add/ensure ebs_optimized = true on the target aws_instance.

CKV_AWS_71.recipe_text: Add/ensure encrypted = true on the target aws_redshift_cluster.

CKV_AWS_141.recipe_text: Add/ensure enhanced_vpc_routing = true on the target aws_redshift_cluster.

CKV_AWS_87.recipe_text: Add a logging block with enable = true and a target bucket_name on the target aws_redshift_cluster.

CKV_AWS_43.recipe_text: Add/ensure encryption_type = "KMS" and kms_key_id = "alias/aws/kinesis" on the target aws_kinesis_stream.

CKV_AWS_83.recipe_text: Add an encrypt_at_rest block with enabled = true inside the target aws_elasticsearch_domain or aws_opensearch_domain resource.

CKV_AWS_86.recipe_text: Add a node_to_node_encryption block with enabled = true inside the target aws_elasticsearch_domain or aws_opensearch_domain resource.

CKV_AWS_84.recipe_text: Add a log_publishing_options block inside the target aws_elasticsearch_domain or aws_opensearch_domain. Set log_type to one of INDEX_SLOW_LOGS, SEARCH_SLOW_LOGS, or ES_APPLICATION_LOGS, and reference a cloudwatch_log_group_arn.

CKV2_AWS_59.recipe_text: Add a domain_endpoint_options block with enforce_https = true inside the target aws_elasticsearch_domain or aws_opensearch_domain.

CKV_AWS_80.recipe_text: Add an encryption_info block containing an encryption_in_transit block with client_broker = "TLS" inside the target aws_msk_cluster.

CKV_AWS_81.recipe_text: Add an encryption_info block containing an encryption_at_rest block with data_volume_kms_key_id = "alias/aws/kafka" inside the target aws_msk_cluster.

CKV_AWS_149.recipe_text: Set kms_key_id on aws_secretsmanager_secret to a customer-managed KMS key ARN (not alias/aws/secretsmanager).

CKV2_AWS_57.recipe_text: Enable rotation on the target aws_secretsmanager_secret by adding rotation_rules with automatically_after_days = 30. A rotation lambda ARN must be referenced — add an aws_secretsmanager_secret_rotation resource if not already present.

CKV_AWS_166.recipe_text: Add/ensure kms_key_arn on the target aws_backup_vault. Reference an existing aws_kms_key resource ARN, or use "alias/aws/backup".

CKV_AWS_147.recipe_text: Add/ensure encryption_key on the target aws_codebuild_project. Reference an existing aws_kms_key resource ARN, or use "alias/aws/s3".

CKV_AWS_78.recipe_text: Add/ensure disable_api_termination = true on the target aws_instance to protect against accidental termination.

CKV2_AWS_21.recipe_text: Set backup_retention_period = 7 on the RDS cluster to retain automated backups for 7 days.

CKV_AWS_274.recipe_text: Remove AWS AdministratorAccess managed policy attachments from IAM users/roles/groups and replace with least-privilege policies.

terraform_required_version.recipe_text: Add a terraform block with a required_version constraint (e.g. ">= 1.0.0") to enforce minimum Terraform version. Place it at the top of the main.tf or versions.tf file.

terraform_required_providers.recipe_text: Add a required_providers block inside the terraform block specifying the AWS provider source and version constraint (e.g. hashicorp/aws >= 4.0).

terraform_deprecated_interpolation.recipe_text: Replace deprecated string-only interpolations like "${var.foo}" with direct references like var.foo.

CKV2_AWS_6.recipe_text: Add a new aws_s3_bucket_public_access_block resource in the SAME FILE at the END of the file (after the last line of the file), not inline. Reference the target aws_s3_bucket block. Set bucket = aws_s3_bucket.<bucket_name>.id (replace <bucket_name> with the exact resource name of the failing bucket). Set block_public_acls = true, block_public_policy = true, ignore_public_acls = true, restrict_public_buckets = true.

CKV2_AWS_62.recipe_text: Add a new aws_s3_bucket_notification resource at the END of the file (after the last line of the file), not inline. Reference the target aws_s3_bucket. Set bucket = aws_s3_bucket.<bucket_name>.id (replace <bucket_name> with the exact resource name). Add at least one lambda_function, queue, or topic notification block with events = ["s3:ObjectCreated:*"]. Place it after the target bucket block.

CKV_AWS_145.recipe_text: Add a new aws_s3_bucket_server_side_encryption_configuration resource at the END of the file (after the last line of the file), not inline. Reference the target aws_s3_bucket. Set bucket = aws_s3_bucket.<bucket_name>.id (replace <bucket_name> with the exact resource name). Add: rule { apply_server_side_encryption_by_default { sse_algorithm = "aws:kms" } }.

CKV_AWS_18.recipe_text: Add a new aws_s3_bucket_logging resource at the END of the file (after the last line of the file), not inline. Reference the target aws_s3_bucket. Set bucket = aws_s3_bucket.<bucket_name>.id (replace <bucket_name> with the exact resource name). Set target_bucket = aws_s3_bucket.<bucket_name>.id and target_prefix = "log/".

CKV_AWS_21.recipe_text: Add a new aws_s3_bucket_versioning resource at the END of the file (after the last line of the file), not inline. Reference the target aws_s3_bucket. Set bucket = aws_s3_bucket.<bucket_name>.id (replace <bucket_name> with the exact resource name). Add: versioning_configuration { status = "Enabled" }.

CKV_AWS_3.recipe_text: Add/ensure encrypted = true on the target aws_ebs_volume resource.

CKV_AWS_7.recipe_text: Add/ensure enable_key_rotation = true on the target aws_kms_key resource.

CKV_AWS_17.recipe_text: Add/ensure publicly_accessible = false on the target aws_db_instance resource.

CKV2_AWS_64.recipe_text: Add a policy attribute to the target aws_kms_key resource with a JSON policy that includes at least one Statement allowing the account root principal (arn:aws:iam::<account_id>:root) to perform kms:* actions. Use a heredoc or jsonencode().
